name: Zoning and Land Use Intake
description: Zoning and land use intake for property owners, developers, and real estate professionals assessing the zoning status of a property or pursuing a zoning change. Evaluates the current zoning, the permitted uses, the proposed use or change, the variance or rezoning process, and the timeline to produce a zoning intake profile with use assessment and process requirements. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
